application_roles.description: What kinds of application surfaces or runtime roles this project includes.

repository_shape.description: How the code is organized across repositories.

business_criticality.description: How costly failure, architectural drift, or instability would be for the business.

team_size.description: Approximate number of engineers working on the project.

priorities.description: The main qualities the architecture should optimize for. Order matters.

constraints.description: Known constraints that should influence architectural judgment and recommendations.

known_pain_points.description: Current problems the team is experiencing that may be architecture-related.

target_architecture.description: Optional freeform description of the architecture the team wants, to help detect drift between intent and reality.
